title: anisomeles candicans
intro: Anisomeles candicans, also known as the fragrant anisomeles or Thai basil, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Anisomeles candicans include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Anisomeles candicans can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried leaves, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
